meta.title: Flux Agency — Premium Digital & IT Solutions
meta.description: Flux Agency designs and engineers premium digital products, automation and infrastructure for ambitious companies across 15 countries.

hero.title: We engineer digital experiences of exceptional precision
hero.subtitle: A premium IT and digital solutions agency building websites, products, automation and infrastructure for ambitious brands across 15 countries.

servicesTeaser.title: Four disciplines, one standard of craft
servicesTeaser.subtitle: From digital products to infrastructure, every engagement is engineered with the same editorial precision.

portfolioTeaser.title: Recent engagements
portfolioTeaser.subtitle: A small selection of the products and platforms we've shipped for our partners.

philosophy.title: Engineered like architecture, designed like editorial
philosophy.body: We treat every product as a structure — measured, load-tested and built to last. Nothing ships until it earns its place.

hero.title: The Services Explorer
hero.subtitle: Four disciplines. Twenty capabilities. One integrated studio for digital products, automation, infrastructure and communication.

digitalProducts.title: Digital Products
digitalProducts.description: Interfaces and platforms engineered for growth.

businessAutomation.title: Business Automation
businessAutomation.description: Systems that remove friction from your operations.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Foundations built to scale without compromise.

communication.title: Communication
communication.description: Channels that keep you close to your customers.

websites.title: Websites
websites.description: Corporate and brand websites engineered for clarity and conversion.
websites.detailDescription: A corporate website is often the first serious conversation your brand has with the world. We design and build fast, precise, editorial websites that carry your positioning with confidence — structured for SEO, effortless to manage, and engineered to convert curiosity into contact.

landingPages.title: Landing Pages
landingPages.description: High-conversion pages built around a single, focused goal.
landingPages.detailDescription: Every campaign deserves a page built with the same rigor as the media budget behind it. We design landing pages around a single action, tested and refined until every scroll earns its keep.

webApplications.title: Web Applications
webApplications.description: Custom platforms and internal tools built to scale with your business.
webApplications.detailDescription: From internal dashboards to customer-facing platforms, we build web applications with production-grade architecture from day one — designed to stay maintainable as your product and team grow.

clientPortals.title: Client Portals
clientPortals.description: Secure, branded spaces where your clients track work and data in real time.
clientPortals.detailDescription: A client portal turns a scattered email thread into a single source of truth. We design secure, on-brand portals where your clients can track progress, access documents and communicate — reducing overhead on both sides.

onlineStores.title: Online Stores
onlineStores.description: E-commerce experiences designed to sell with clarity and speed.
onlineStores.detailDescription: We build online stores that feel as premium as the products they sell — fast checkout, considered merchandising and an admin experience your team will actually enjoy using.

telegramBots.title: Telegram Bots
telegramBots.description: Automated Telegram experiences for sales, support and community.
telegramBots.detailDescription: Telegram has become a primary channel for commerce and community in many markets. We design and build bots that automate sales, onboarding and support without losing the human tone of your brand.

crmIntegration.title: CRM Integration
crmIntegration.description: Unify your customer data into one reliable source of truth.
crmIntegration.detailDescription: We connect and configure CRM systems so every team — sales, support, marketing — works from the same accurate picture of the customer, without duplicate data or manual re-entry.

workflowAutomation.title: Workflow Automation
workflowAutomation.description: Remove repetitive manual work from your team's daily operations.
workflowAutomation.detailDescription: We map your operational workflows and rebuild the repetitive parts as automated systems — freeing your team to focus on the work that actually requires judgement.

aiChatbots.title: AI Chatbots
aiChatbots.description: Conversational assistants that handle real customer questions.
aiChatbots.detailDescription: We design and train AI-driven chatbots that go beyond scripted flows — understanding intent, pulling from your knowledge base, and escalating gracefully to a human when needed.

processConsulting.title: Process Consulting
processConsulting.description: An outside perspective on how your operations could run.
processConsulting.detailDescription: Sometimes the highest-leverage work is diagnostic. We audit your current operations, identify the bottlenecks worth solving, and deliver a clear, prioritized roadmap for automation and improvement.

dataDashboards.title: Data Dashboards
dataDashboards.description: Clear, real-time visibility into the metrics that matter.
dataDashboards.detailDescription: We design dashboards that turn scattered data into a single, legible view — built for the decisions your team actually needs to make, not vanity metrics.

cloudHosting.title: Cloud Hosting
cloudHosting.description: Reliable, scalable infrastructure managed end to end.
cloudHosting.detailDescription: We design and manage cloud environments that stay calm under load — right-sized, cost-aware and built with the redundancy your business depends on.

devopsCicd.title: DevOps & CI/CD
devopsCicd.description: Ship faster with confidence through automated pipelines.
devopsCicd.detailDescription: We build continuous integration and delivery pipelines that turn deployments from an event into a routine — automated testing, staged rollouts and instant rollback when needed.

securityMonitoring.title: Security & Monitoring
securityMonitoring.description: Proactive protection and visibility across your systems.
securityMonitoring.detailDescription: We implement security practices and monitoring systems that catch issues before your customers do — from access control to real-time alerting on anomalies.

scalableArchitecture.title: Scalable Architecture
scalableArchitecture.description: Technical foundations designed for your next stage of growth.
scalableArchitecture.detailDescription: We design system architecture that anticipates growth — modular, well-documented and free of the shortcuts that turn into expensive rewrites later.

messagingBots.title: WhatsApp & Telegram Bots
messagingBots.description: Automated conversations across the channels your customers already use.
messagingBots.detailDescription: We build messaging automations for WhatsApp and Telegram that handle orders, support and updates automatically, while keeping an authentic, on-brand voice.

emailMarketing.title: Email & Marketing Automation
emailMarketing.description: Lifecycle campaigns that run themselves and perform.
emailMarketing.detailDescription: We design and automate email and marketing journeys — from onboarding to retention — built on clean segmentation and measured relentlessly against real revenue outcomes.

customerSupport.title: Customer Support Systems
customerSupport.description: Help desk infrastructure that scales with your customer base.
customerSupport.detailDescription: We implement support systems — ticketing, knowledge bases, live chat — configured around your actual support volume and team structure, so response times stay fast as you grow.

internalTools.title: Internal Tools
internalTools.description: Purpose-built software for the way your team actually works.
internalTools.detailDescription: Off-the-shelf software rarely fits perfectly. We build lightweight internal tools tailored to your exact workflows — from admin panels to reporting utilities — so your team spends less time working around software.

hero.title: Selected engagements
hero.subtitle: A curated look at products, platforms and systems we've engineered for partners across 15 countries.

cta.title: Have a project in mind?
cta.subtitle: Let's talk about what you're building.

case1.title: Northgate Capital
case1.description: A private investment platform with a secure client portal and real-time portfolio reporting.

case2.title: Meridian Clinics
case2.description: A multi-location patient management system with automated scheduling and reminders.

case3.title: Solene Studio
case3.description: A premium online store and brand site rebuilt for speed, clarity and conversion.

hero.title: Precision, by design
hero.subtitle: Flux Agency is a studio of engineers, designers and strategists building the digital backbone of ambitious companies.

paragraphs: Flux Agency was founded on a simple conviction: that digital work deserves the same discipline as engineering, and the same care as editorial design.

For eight years, we've built websites, products, automations and infrastructure for companies who refuse to settle for generic. Not because they asked for luxury — because they understood that precision compounds.
Today we work with partners across 15 countries, carrying the same standard into every engagement: measured, deliberate, and built to last well beyond launch day.

mission.title: Build fewer things, build them exactly right
mission.body: We don't chase every trend or take every brief. We choose a small number of engagements each quarter and give each one the depth it deserves — from strategy through to the smallest interaction detail.

approach.title: Engineered like architecture, considered like editorial

items.title: Diagnose before we design
items.body: Every engagement starts with understanding the real problem, not the assumed one.

items.title: Systems, not one-offs
items.body: We build design systems and technical foundations that outlive the first release.

items.title: Measured, not decorated
items.body: Every element earns its place through function first, aesthetics second.

items.title: Shipped, then refined
items.body: We stay close after launch — performance, iteration and support are part of the work.

items.title: One team, full lifecycle
items.body: Strategy, design, engineering and infrastructure under a single roof — no hand-off gaps.

items.title: Editorial standards
items.body: Every interface is treated as a piece of craft, not a template with your logo on it.

items.title: Engineering discipline
items.body: Production-grade architecture from day one, tested, documented and built to scale.

items.title: Long-term partnership
items.body: We measure success by what happens after launch, not just the day it ships.

cta.title: Let's build something exact
cta.subtitle: Tell us what you're working on.

hero.title: Let's start a conversation
hero.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll reply within one business day.

form.name: Full name
form.success: Thank you — your message has been sent. We'll be in touch shortly.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

footer.tagline: A premium IT & digital solutions studio, engineering precision across 15 countries.
